Event: Christmas Sorcery Festival
Event Date: 01/12/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: SG10


Other locations the gear can be found
Mystic Dragon
Gun 'Petrifier'

On dealing 40000 damage, summons a turret that cannot be killed and deals 9200 damage per second. Every 40000 damage done by the turret's owner enhances damage done by the turret' by 700 (stack 5 times).
The turret is destroyed when its owner is killed.
**Turret:** Turret's attacks have a 30% chance to turn an enemy to stone for 2 sec. They can't move and take 50% more damage.

Requirements: 98-100
